title: cassia agnes
intro: Cassia agnes, also known as Ceylon senna, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to Sri Lanka. Its leaves and pods have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include laxative, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cassia agnes include relief from constipation, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Cassia agnes is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal supplements, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various health conditions.
